top_signals.title: ‘Long-term holders are hodling’: K33 says record supply metric suggests bear market may be nearing an end
top_signals.summary: K33 said stabilizing conditions and trading activity falling back to yearly lows reflect a market where holders are reluctant to sell.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Furetank VINGA Series Tanker to be Named
